positive: Minimalist abstract geometric pattern featuring interconnected lines and simple organic shapes in a muted earth tone palette (sage, terracotta, cream). Clean vector art style, negative space composition, Bauhaus influence, perfect symmetry, suitable for apparel print.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, messy, graffiti, gradients
